test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests check for specific strings that don't exist in the original codebase (e.g., 'badge?: React.ReactNode;' in DropdownMenuItem.tsx, 'badge={badge}' passed to MenuItemContent). A stub/no-op implementation wouldn't add these strings to the source files.
